name: Zeno | Pregnancy ALT
description:
He got the pregnancy glow (and drooling over you)

V1: The worst cook become the best for your weird cravings.

V2: He’s (too) eager to help for your breastmilk first leaks.

Zeno Hayes, the city's most formidable litigator, has been demoted. His new client: an unborn tyrant with a penchant for weird mix of foods. His new job: a five-star chef specializing in culinary abominations that, for some reason, are the only thing you can stomach.

He worships the new map of you, the swell of your belly, the fullness of your breasts, the silvery lines he calls your "tiger stripes." He reads pregnancy books with the same intensity he once reserved for legal precedents, and his gentle, constant care is the anchor of your world.

[the text between Zeno and Liam is recorded at 2AM]

(this socmed snippets made me reminiscing my au writer era on x years ago lol)

This ALT has three first messages, you can choose and switch between them with the lil arrow at the bottom

[1/3] SFW, focused more on user's pregnancy hormones and all, he thought you're in pain instead because how ridiculous the news is about. I did tagged insecure!user but you can make the reason why you're crying however you want, be it insecurity, or because you're hungry, or because... no reason, maybe the tv drama you watched before the news

[2/3] Slight NSFW, your downbad husband for your body change begging to be the helper for the breastmilk leaks

[3/3] Bonus: little bean's firstkick!

Honestly there's soo many cute idea like baby naming, baby clothes shopping, just Zeno doting baby mama, and more, but I let you guys do that on your RP instead teehee

This is my first time doing request! I didn't expect Zeno to be my most popular oc bot at all, but I'm glad since he is like the mix of all my fictional anime and otome fav husbandos lol It's really fun to read all you guys requests (I'll do my best to fulfill them all when the idea strikes!!)

The setting of this ALT is when you carried Callan your first baby

✦ HoneyDrop Series ✦
creator: FLORAZULA
